title: i love my settings
description:
a mod that automatically syncs your Minecraft settings across instances using a file outside of the instance
(Global settings)
body:
this mods automatically syncs your Minecraft settings to a shared file in your Documents folder. Features up to 5 save slots and automatic syncing whenever you change a setting.


### **(Documents\minecraft\)**


you use modmenu's mod config to change settings like turning on and off automatic syncing and save slot managment

~~**_Known limitation_**: Keybinds for mods that aren't present in all instances may reset when switching between a modded and unmodded instance. This is a Minecraft limitation and cannot be fully fixed without putting in a LOT more effort into this.~~
```
This issue has been fixed in the 26.1 (and up) version
```

**_Probably doesnt work on linux_**

_have fun_
## _**Modmenu is a dependancy**_
